name: Tinder Chat (Unofficial Global Group)
tagline: Huge unofficial global dating chat group
description: Tinder Chat is one of the largest public dating chat groups on Telegram — around 49,500 members with 100+ online at any time (July 2026). It is an unofficial fan group, not affiliated with Tinder, where members chat and arrange meets across regions.
cons: Open groups attract spam; use judgment
seoDescription: Huge unofficial global dating chat group. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
